ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dokploy/dokploy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dokploy/dokploy
Language: typescript
Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
Language: typescript
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KnockOutEZ/wigolo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KnockOutEZ/wigolo
Language: typescript
The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/qwen-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/qwen-code
Language: typescript
An open-source AI coding agent that lives in your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
Language: typescript
Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: earendil-works/pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/earendil-works/pi
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: unified LLM API, agent loop, TUI, coding agent CLI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: every-app/open-seo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/every-app/open-seo
Language: typescript
Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langgenius/dify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langgenius/dify
Language: typescript
Build Agentic workflows, RAG pipelines, with rich AI model and tool support on one collaborative workspace. Deploy on cloud, VPC, or self-hosted, so teams move from prototype to production without rebuilding the stack.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: likec4/likec4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/likec4/likec4
Language: typescript
Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Ontology-Playground
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Ontology-Playground
Language: typescript
Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rohitg00/agentmemory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rohitg00/agentmemory
Language: typescript
#1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop, mobile and VPS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: traycerai/traycer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/traycerai/traycer
Language: typescript
Traycer: Nerve Center for Agentic Coding

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vercel-labs/deepsec
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vercel-labs/deepsec
Language: typescript
Deepsec is a security harness for finding vulnerabilities in your codebase powered by coding agents
